description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features a covered porch supported by white columns, with two palm trees symmetrically planted in the driveway area. Large windows line both floors, providing ample natural light and a sense of openness. The property includes a driveway with a parked car, a backyard area with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and an umbrella, as well as several trees for landscaping. The exterior is finished in a monochrome palette, primarily black and white, with a sleek, contemporary aesthetic. The overall layout is spacious, with clear separation between the living area, outdoor amenities, and parking.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a front porch, driveway, and a backyard pool area, finished in black and white.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch, driveway with two palm trees, and a car parked to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, car, and the symmetrical arrangement of the front porch and palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, umbrella, and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the pool area, umbrella, and surrounding trees.
